subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath sent down unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, wherein is mentioned that which draweth hearts unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم و یذکر فیه ما تجتذب القلوب الی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to the people of the world, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
